metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_722
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 1i IL1RAPL1 coimmunoprecipitates with PSD-95
Fig. 2c Il1RAPL1 colocalizes with PSD-95

Literal: "Finally, the interaction between IL1RAPL1 and PSD-95 was biochemically proven by pull-down and immunoprecipitation experiments in transfected COS-7 cells and in vivo from neuronal protein extract." "The endogenous IL1RAPL1 mostly colocalized with PSD-95 and Shank proteins (percent of IL1RAPL1 colocalization with PSD-95"

7/6/2017 Pim
- PSD-95 is a marker protein for glutamatergic synapses.
- IL1RAPL1 has a TM domain.. Experimental description: Coimmunoprecipitatiopn experiments are made in rat brain extract.
Colocalization with endogenous PDD-95 is made in rat hippocampal neurons.

Literal form M&M
"Low-density hippocampal neuronal cultures were prepared from E18-E19 rat hippocampi as previously described"
